members.name: Source
members.summary: Determines the source for the lookup.

members.name: Texture
members.summary: The source texture, if needed for the selected [member source].

members.name: TextureType
members.summary: Specifies the type of the texture if [member source] is set to [constant SOURCE_TEXTURE].

values.name: SOURCE_2D_NORMAL
values.summary: Use the texture from this shader's normal map built-in.

values.name: SOURCE_2D_TEXTURE
values.summary: Use the texture from this shader's texture built-in (e.g. a texture of a [Sprite2D]).

values.name: SOURCE_3D_NORMAL
values.summary: Use the normal buffer captured during the depth prepass. Only available when the normal-roughness buffer is available (i.e. in spatial shaders and in the forward_plus renderer).

values.name: SOURCE_DEPTH
values.summary: Use the depth texture captured during the depth prepass. Only available when the depth prepass is used (i.e. in spatial shaders and in the forward_plus or gl_compatibility renderers).

values.name: SOURCE_MAX
values.summary: Represents the size of the [enum Source] enum.

values.name: SOURCE_PORT
values.summary: Use the texture provided in the input port for this function.

values.name: SOURCE_ROUGHNESS
values.summary: Use the roughness buffer captured during the depth prepass. Only available when the normal-roughness buffer is available (i.e. in spatial shaders and in the forward_plus renderer).

values.name: SOURCE_SCREEN
values.summary: Use the current viewport's texture as the source.

values.name: SOURCE_TEXTURE
values.summary: Use the texture given as an argument for this function.

values.name: TYPE_COLOR
values.summary: Adds [code]source_color[/code] as hint to the uniform declaration for proper conversion from nonlinear sRGB encoding to linear encoding.

values.name: TYPE_DATA
values.summary: No hints are added to the uniform declaration.

values.name: TYPE_MAX
values.summary: Represents the size of the [enum TextureType] enum.

values.name: TYPE_NORMAL_MAP
values.summary: Adds [code]hint_normal[/code] as hint to the uniform declaration, which internally converts the texture for proper usage as normal map.

constants.name: SOURCE_TEXTURE
constants.summary: Use the texture given as an argument for this function.

constants.name: SOURCE_SCREEN
constants.summary: Use the current viewport's texture as the source.

constants.name: SOURCE_2D_TEXTURE
constants.summary: Use the texture from this shader's texture built-in (e.g. a texture of a [Sprite2D]).

constants.name: SOURCE_2D_NORMAL
constants.summary: Use the texture from this shader's normal map built-in.

constants.name: SOURCE_DEPTH
constants.summary: Use the depth texture captured during the depth prepass. Only available when the depth prepass is used (i.e. in spatial shaders and in the forward_plus or gl_compatibility renderers).

constants.name: SOURCE_PORT
constants.summary: Use the texture provided in the input port for this function.

constants.name: SOURCE_3D_NORMAL
constants.summary: Use the normal buffer captured during the depth prepass. Only available when the normal-roughness buffer is available (i.e. in spatial shaders and in the forward_plus renderer).

constants.name: SOURCE_ROUGHNESS
constants.summary: Use the roughness buffer captured during the depth prepass. Only available when the normal-roughness buffer is available (i.e. in spatial shaders and in the forward_plus renderer).

constants.name: SOURCE_MAX
constants.summary: Represents the size of the [enum Source] enum.

constants.name: TYPE_DATA
constants.summary: No hints are added to the uniform declaration.

constants.name: TYPE_COLOR
constants.summary: Adds [code]source_color[/code] as hint to the uniform declaration for proper conversion from nonlinear sRGB encoding to linear encoding.

constants.name: TYPE_NORMAL_MAP
constants.summary: Adds [code]hint_normal[/code] as hint to the uniform declaration, which internally converts the texture for proper usage as normal map.

constants.name: TYPE_MAX
constants.summary: Represents the size of the [enum TextureType] enum.
